LUTO Multiplier Explorer
Multiplier applied uniformly to all cells (no spatial variation). BAU = yieldincreases_bau2022.csv; others = sheets from yieldincreases_ag_2050.xlsx.
RdBu_r centred at 1.0 (blue = benefit, red = loss). Grey = public/non-agricultural land.
Spatial mean CCI — all 4 RCPs, selected CO₂ / LM / LU
